name: Discharge of Fiduciary from Personal Liability

eligibility.description: Requires a written application to the Secretary for determination of the tax amount. Also provides discharge for good faith reliance on gift tax returns for gifts made more than 3 years before death.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows an executor or fiduciary to apply for a determination of the estate tax amount and be discharged from personal liability for any future deficiencies upon payment of that amount.
